waypoints.note: Bombarding Force C station, ~12 km north-west of Pointe-du-Hoc.
Opens fire on Pointe-du-Hoc battery (target 1) at 05:50 ; later shifts to Vierville draw and bluff defenses.
Closes the range mid-morning to deliver direct fire on stubborn Vierville bluff defenses ; goes briefly into 7 fathoms.
Withdrawn to nominal bombardment station at end of MVP window ; on call for night gunfire support.
